content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Found one correctness-risk issue: CLI terminal reconciliation currently records project id as task_id in terminal reconciliation calls, reducing accuracy of reconciliation diagnostics and task-level tracing. This should be replaced with a real task identifier (or task-run identifier derived from terminal run data) where available.

## Amendments

1. The CLI terminal path still passes `project_id` as the `task_id` argument when invoking `reconcile_terminal_review_classifications` (and the downstream failure/success error path uses the same context), so all reconciliation diagnostics/sync error context is attached to the project instead of the concrete task execution. In `sync` logs this causes incorrect traceability and can make post-failure/operator forensics ambiguous when multiple tasks share a project/ bead context.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: In `src/cli/run.rs` this function currently has no task-scoped id to thread through, and the code uses `project_id` as a fallback in both parameters at call site.
